name: @pretalx/frontend
description: Frontend apps bundled with pretalx: the schedule editor and the public schedule.

scripts.build: npm run build:manifest && npm run build:wc
scripts.lint: npm run lint:editor && npm run lint:schedule
scripts.lint:fix: cd schedule-editor && eslint . --fix && cd ../schedule && eslint src --fix
scripts.i18n:convert2gettext: cd schedule-editor && i18next-conv -l en -s locales/en/translation.json -t locales/en/translation.po
